name: fixera-web-system
description: Public-safe portfolio edition of the Fixera bilingual website system.

scripts.clean: rimraf public && mkdir -p public/css public/js public/images public/icons public/favicon public/fonts
scripts.dev:html: npm run build:html && chokidar "src/**/*.html" -c "npm run build:html" --debounce 200
scripts.dev:assets: npx -y cpx2 "src/{images,icons,favicon,fonts}/**/*" public --watch && npx -y cpx2 src/js/gallery-data.json public/js --watch && { [ -f src/js/projects-data.json ] && npx -y cpx2 src/js/projects-data.json public/js --watch || true; } && { [ -f src/js/ga.js ] && npx -y cpx2 src/js/ga.js public/js --watch || true; } && { [ -f src/js/fb.js ] && npx -y cpx2 src/js/fb.js public/js --watch || true; } && { [ -f src/js/attribution.js ] && npx -y cpx2 src/js/attribution.js public/js --watch || true; } && npx -y cpx2 src/robots.txt public --watch && npx -y cpx2 src/site.webmanifest public --watch && npx -y cpx2 src/llms.txt public --watch
scripts.build:assets: mkdir -p public/images public/icons public/favicon public/fonts public/js && { [ -d src/images ] && npx -y cpx2 "src/images/**/*" public/images || true; } && { [ -d src/icons ] && npx -y cpx2 "src/icons/**/*" public/icons || true; } && { [ -d src/favicon ] && npx -y cpx2 "src/favicon/**/*" public/favicon || true; } && { [ -d src/fonts ] && npx -y cpx2 "src/fonts/**/*" public/fonts || true; } && { [ -f src/js/gallery-data.json ] && npx -y cpx2 src/js/gallery-data.json public/js || true; } && { [ -f src/js/projects-data.json ] && npx -y cpx2 src/js/projects-data.json public/js || true; } && { [ -f src/js/ga.js ] && npx -y cpx2 src/js/ga.js public/js || true; } && { [ -f src/js/fb.js ] && npx -y cpx2 src/js/fb.js public/js || true; } && { [ -f src/js/attribution.js ] && npx -y cpx2 src/js/attribution.js public/js || true; } && { [ -f src/robots.txt ] && npx -y cpx2 src/robots.txt public || true; } && { [ -f src/site.webmanifest ] && npx -y cpx2 src/site.webmanifest public || true; } && { [ -f src/llms.txt ] && npx -y cpx2 src/llms.txt public || true; }
scripts.dev: npm-run-all --parallel dev:css dev:js dev:html dev:assets dev:sitemap serve
scripts.build: npm run check:no-em-dash && run-s clean build:assets build:css build:js build:html
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run validate
scripts.build:full: npm run build && npm run verify
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run lint && npm run lint:css && npm run build && npm run validate && npm run validate:clean-urls && npm run validate:i18n && npm run validate:images && npm run validate:public-safety && npm run validate:public-docs
